shop.society_trading.banker.description: Sells tools that help manage you money.
shop.society_trading.bard.description: Sells fun tools for music, photography, & custom paintings.
shop.society_trading.blacksmith.descript: Sells some metals, smithing templates, & geode processing tools.
shop.society_trading.witch.description: Sells wands & Crystals of Regret for resetting skill trees.
shop.society_trading.trader.description: Barters for Artisan Machine upgrades & other useful items.
shop.society_trading.farmer.description: Sells fertilizers, cooking supplies, & other farming equipment.
shop.society_trading.fisher.description: Sells Fishing Rods & upgrades, alongside diving equipment & tools.
shop.society_trading.leatherworker.descr: Sells leather equipment such as Backpacks & Saddles.
shop.society_trading.master_cultivator.d: Sells valuables crop seeds & fruit tree saplings.
shop.society_trading.mystical_botanist.d: Sells expensive late game items such as Furniture Catalogs & Sharestones.
shop.society_trading.shepherd.descriptio: Sells animal related equipment & some farm animal Spawn Crates.
shop.society_trading.book_fair.descripti: Sells all kinds of Skill Books. Can only be called at the end of every season.
shop.society_trading.market.description: Sells basic seeds & saplings depending on the season.
shop.society_trading.carpenter.descripti: Sells building blocks & seasonal furniture for constructing your farm.
shop.society_trading.invitations.descrip: Has trades to invite new villagers to your town.
shop.society_trading.guild.description: Sells goods for adventuring and fighting mobs.
shop.society_trading.wanderer.descriptio: The Wandering Trader will visit with an array of furniture and books
shop.society_trading.wandering_baker.des: What strange goods this one sells...
shop.society_trading.wandering_winemaker: Offers seeds from around the globe for starting a vinery
item.society_trading.auto_trader.descrip: Allows you to automatically trade from all unlocked shops. Cannot trade for stock-limited or unlocked trades.
shop.society_trading.bs_home.description: Farmhouses are the main housing of your farm.
shop.society_trading.bs_barn.description: Barns are perfectly sized for larger farm animals.
shop.society_trading.bs_deluxe_barn.desc: Deluxe Barns are larger, grander versions of barns, with seperate sections to divide up animals.
shop.society_trading.bs_coop.description: Coops are small cozy homes for all types of egg-laying animals.
shop.society_trading.bs_greenhouse.descr: Greenhouses are buildings perfect for growing Anything, Anytime, Anywhere!
shop.society_trading.bs_shed.description: Sheds are utility buildings for storing Artisan Machines, chests, and anything else you need.
shop.society_trading.bs_large_shed.descr: Large Sheds are as you may expect; larger sheds!
